description: Restructure 13-step pipeline to 12 steps, reorder stages, and fix fact-check UI bugs

userStories.title: Remove Final Polish step and reorder pipeline stages
userStories.description: Remove step 9 (Final Polish) entirely and reorder steps 6-13 to the new 12-step sequence: Fact-Check(6), Human Review(7), Devils Advocate(8), Integrate Critiques(9), Style Guide(10), Edit for Style(11), Export(12). Update all step number references in pipeline types, nav, progress, and view components.
acceptanceCriteria: Pipeline has exactly 12 steps in the correct order: steps 1-5 unchanged, then Fact-Check(6), Human Review(7), Devils Advocate(8), Integrate Critiques(9), Style Guide(10), Edit for Style(11), Export(12)
Final Polish step is completely removed from UI and worker
userStories.notes: This is the foundational change - all other stories depend on correct numbering

userStories.title: Update worker handlers for new step numbers
userStories.description: Move the combined style-edit handler (style-edit.ts) from steps 6+7 to steps 10+11. Remove final-style-pass.ts handler. Update all handler step-number references and stage route mappings to match the new 12-step sequence.
acceptanceCriteria: style-edit.ts handler fires at steps 10 and 11 instead of 6 and 7
All worker handlers reference correct new step numbers
Stage routes return correct step mappings

userStories.title: Write Drizzle DB migration to renumber stages
userStories.description: Create a Drizzle migration that renumbers stage rows on existing projects from the old 13-step sequence to the new 12-step sequence, removes Final Polish stage rows, and updates project creation code to pre-create 12 stages instead of 13.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration renumbers existing stage rows to match new 12-step order
Final Polish stage rows are removed from existing projects
New project creation pre-creates 12 stages instead of 13
userStories.notes: Migration must handle existing projects with in-progress pipelines

userStories.title: Fix fact-check double-toggle bug
userStories.description: In fact-check-review.tsx, the parent div onClick AND Checkbox onCheckedChange both call toggleFinding, causing a double-toggle. Fix so only one event fires per click.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a fact-check checkbox toggles the finding exactly once
No double-toggle occurs from parent div onClick propagation
userStories.notes: Likely fix is stopPropagation on the checkbox or removing the parent onClick

userStories.title: Add Skip button to fact-check stage
userStories.description: Add a Skip button to fact-check-review.tsx that completes the fact-check stage with 0 corrections without requiring any selections.
acceptanceCriteria: Skip button is visible on the fact-check review UI
Clicking Skip completes the stage with 0 corrections
No selections are required to skip
